title: Hippagrostis burmanni
taxonomy: Hippagrostis burmanni is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is native to India and is known by several common names, including the Bengal grass and Burmann's grass. The plant is classified as a type of grass that is commonly found in wetlands and grasslands. Its classification is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Tracheophytes, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Poales, family Poaceae, genus Hippagrostis, species H. burmanni.
